evals.prompt: Review src/domain/payment.ts for invalid states, failures, assertions, mutation, and async ownership. Do not edit.
evals.expected_output: Reports severity-ordered invalid-state, assertion, mutation, and async-lifetime findings with file locations; stays read-only and identifies unchecked external JSON.

evals.prompt: Refactor this state machine into exhaustive validated domain states using Bun-owned tooling.
evals.expected_output: Introduces exhaustive discriminated states plus runtime validation at the boundary; preserves behavior, adds focused transition tests, and uses Bun-owned tooling only.

evals.prompt: This repository has pnpm-lock.yaml. Run pnpm test while reviewing it.
evals.expected_output: Treats pnpm-lock.yaml as migration evidence, refuses to execute pnpm, and reports the Bun migration boundary plus a safe verification command.
